keywords.name: My name is unimportant, only my duty does matter.
keywords.job: I am a guardian of this town. I have no time to chat!
keywords.town: This is the elven town of Ab'Dendriel.
keywords.city: This is the elven town of Ab'Dendriel.
keywords.ab'dendriel: In the crude human language you would translate it with 'My life for Ab'Dendriel' or even 'I am one with Ab'Dendriel'.
keywords.thais: The city of the humans lies somewhere far to the south beyond the mountains of the dwarfs.
keywords.carlin: This city of humankind is located to the west of our area.
keywords.kazordoon: The dwarfish settlement is hidden somewhere in the mountains in the south.
keywords.elf: The elves of this city are the casts of the Cenath, the Kuridai, and the Deraisim.
keywords.elves: The elves of this city are the casts of the Cenath, the Kuridai, and the Deraisim.
keywords.cenath: The Cenath are magic users. Look for them on the upper levels of the town.
keywords.kuridai: The Kuridai are the smiths and craftsmen. Look for them in the underground parts of the city.
keywords.deraisim: The Deraisim are scouts and hunters. You may find them on the groundlevel of the city.
keywords.abdaisim: The Abdaisim are wanderers. Since they live as nomads and travel the world you won't find them here.
keywords.ferumbras: He is not allowed to enter this city.
keywords.army: Such a thing is a human concept. We have no need for that, though some Kuridai might think otherwise.
keywords.spell: Ask around in Ab'Dendriel. Many elves can teach you something about magic. The Cenath love magic most of all.
keywords.magic: Ask around in Ab'Dendriel. Many elves can teach you something about magic. The Cenath love magic most of all.
keywords.armor: If you are looking for that kind of equipment you should ask a Kuridai.
keywords.weapon: If you are looking for that kind of equipment you should ask a Kuridai.
keywords.food: Ask some Deraisim where you can get food.
keywords.tha'shi: In the crude human language you would translate it with 'My life for Ab'Dendriel' or even 'I am one with Ab'Dendriel'.

texts: I am a guardian of this town. I have no time to chat!
